justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time and date requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering a broader range of options until very late in the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple avoidable round-trips by only checking one specific time slot at a time, leading to a very long and unproductive conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest available slots or a broader search, resulting in a repetitive and ultimately unsuccessful interaction.

overall_notes: The agent was unable to book an appointment after 12 turns, primarily because it only checked one specific time slot at a time and did not proactively offer a wider range of available times until the very end of the conversation.
